description: BikeWise is a bicycle incident reporting and information service for crashes, hazards, thefts, and related cycling incidents. Its public site and data model are maintained in the archived `bikeindex/bikewise` project.
summary: BikeWise exposes one public REST API surface: BikeWise API v2 at `https://bikewise.org/api`, with an OpenAPI spec published via APIs.guru and no authentication defined in the spec.
